messages.content: 🎯 Tester2 design-time constraints locked into code block PR scope (post Dev2 grounding library/theme): **Constraint 1: WCAG AA contrast on #003247 (深蓝 dark bg)**: - 全部 text + syntax highlight token 颜色对 #003247 ≥ 4.5:1 - 易踩坑: comment/muted token (常低对比), copy icon dark-bg 对比 - Theme 选择验证 (不只 "看着像", 真量化) - Dev2 选 Shiki/highlight.js 时确认 chosen theme 的 token 色 对 #003247 达 AA **Constraint 2: XSS safety regression** (#187 strict-escape pattern 持守): - Code 内容 escape 必, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML 裸塞 - Shiki/highlight.js 本身 escape (默认安全), 但**集成方式确认不重引入注入面** - 注入 `
